block_01: During a recent account review, it came to our attention that your financial profile and appropriateness test are outdated.
block_02: We kindly ask you to take a moment to update your information and fill out the test at your earliest convenience. Simply click the button below and you will be directed to the form on the IQ Option website.
block_05: Filling out the appropriateness test and updating your financial profile will help us better tailor our services to your needs according to your previous experience and knowledge of trading. We use this test to determine which instruments on the platform best suit your abilities and interests. It also allows us to remain compliant with industry legal requirements. We want to make sure we do all we can to deliver the ultimate trading experience.
block_06: Thank you for trading with IQ Option!
